init.template: Ask the user which locale they want for this project (pt for Portuguese, es for Spanish, or en for English). Then initialize the `.opencode/` project configuration in the current working directory by running the init script with the chosen locale. After init completes, verify `.opencode/locale` contains the chosen language. Then review the generated files.
init.description: Initialize opencode project config with repo context and locale

roc:plan-feature.template: Break down the feature into steps, identify impacted layers, and register risks and planned work in `.opencode/known_issues.md`.

roc:promote.template: Ask the user how many Senior Reviewers should review the work after development (default 1). Do NOT read reviewer count from opencode.json. Then promote a tracked backlog item inside `known_issues.md`. Change `Status` from `backlog` or `ready` to `open`. Then create a remote issue via the create_issue script and start development on the generated branch.
roc:promote.description: Promote backlog item to open and create remote issue

roc:review-branch.template: Ask the user how many Senior Reviewers should perform this review (default 1). Do NOT read reviewer count from opencode.json. Then run a full PR/MR-style review: analyze `git diff`, use that many Senior Engineer reviewers, identify Critical and Major issues only, validate tests and docs, and register new issues.

roc:scan-issues.template: Run a deep analysis of the codebase to detect new issues (security, concurrency, architecture, reliability). Create or update `.opencode/known_issues.md`. Follow the issue entry format from `standards/issues.md`.
roc:scan-issues.description: Deep codebase analysis and issue detection

roc:commit.template: Create an atomic semantic commit following `standards/commits.md`. Use format `<type>(<scope>): <imperative description>` with `Issue: #<id>` and `Status:` trailers. Ask for type/scope/description/issue-id. Detect the project known_issues.md, construct the commit, run `git commit`, and update known_issues.md status based on trailers. Split if the change covers multiple concerns.

roc:sync-issues.template: Scan known_issues.md entries with Remote: references, fetch remote issue state via gh/glab, sync status (close remote if local resolved, reopen if mismatch), create remote issues for open entries without remote, and report sync results.
roc:sync-issues.description: Sync known_issues with remote issue tracker

roc:archive-issue.template: Move a resolved issue from known_issues.md to resolved_issues.md in compact format. The issue must be Status: resolved. Use close_issue.sh which handles both closing and archiving in one step.
roc:archive-issue.description: Archive resolved issue to compact format

roc:maintain.template: Run full maintenance on known_issues.md and standards/prioritization.md. First run `$SCRIPTS_DIR/maintain.sh` to detect stale issues (local in-progress but remote closed) and status mismatches. Then for each stale issue, run `close_issue.sh <id>` to archive. Reindex remaining issues. Report what was archived/updated.

roc:backup.template: Run `$SCRIPTS_DIR/backup.sh` with the provided arguments. Ask the user for: 1) source directory, 2) backup name (default dev_backup), 3) whether to create a .zip. Then execute the backup. After completion, report the backup path, size, and exclusions applied.
roc:backup.description: Create intelligent timestamped backup excluding junk
